interventions.description: Triggered interventions occur due to the carrier's profile scores exceeding the thresholds set by the NSC program office in any one of the four categories.

driverContraventions.desc: Improper or inappropriate use of lights or lighting devices
OPERATE VEHICLE WITH UNAUTHORIZED LAMP ALIGHT
MB ACT: HTA - SEC.: 85OT - TO WIT: DISOBEY TRAFFIC CONTROL DEVICE NOT
MB ACT: HTA - SEC.: 951C - TO WIT: SPEEDING
MB ACT: HTA - SEC.: 1415 - TO WIT: PARK ON A PEDESTRIAN CORRIDOR
DRIVE VEHICLE IN EXCESS OF SPEED
